top_signals.title: Korean Register, HD Hyundai Heavy Industries, Samsung Heavy Industries Publish EEDI Guidelines
top_signals.summary: Korean Register (KR) has published the "Numerical Calculation Guidelines for the Determination of the Attained EEDI," developed through a joint research initiative with HD Hyundai Heavy Industries (HD HHI) and Samsung Heavy Industries (SHI).The…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
